title: verbascum mallophorum
intro: Verbascum mallophorum, also known as Malling's Mullein, is a perennial plant species in the figwort family, characterized by its tall spikes of white, yellow, or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum mallophorum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves and flowers of the plant.
